NEW (pending-human): WIN-013 verdict upgrade from Misleading to Self-Contradicted recommended. Source: WIN-014.c6.json H1. WIN-014 upgraded; WIN-013 still shows Misleading. Structural inconsistency — dome claims SG instruments should show nulls (WIN-013/014) AND PRED-TIER-3 predicts 10-13 µGal SG pulse. Two paths: (a) upgrade WIN-013 with added SG-vs-PRED-TIER-3 framing; (b) accept divergence and add cross-reference. Path (a) preferred scientifically.

SELF-APPLIED: WIN-014 detail_evidence — added Level-3 narrow-band burden sentence before 'The dome cannot simultaneously claim'.
